lines.speaker: Garbek quo Maten
lines.text: Be warned human. The Wyrms here are under my protection. I will not let you kill them unless you have permission.

sections.title: When attempting to kill wyrms outside of a slayer task

lines.speaker: Garbek quo Maten
lines.text: Human! To attack these creatures would be a threat to the balance. Only those with permission may fight them!
